description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag Product Details A purple wallet with floral prints and a bronze flap The flap has hidden magnetic buttons for closure Black self patterned overlay in the front One main compartment with a zippered separator A buttoned flap with 9 card holders and one photo id holder above the flap Three open pockets and a buttoned compartment on the centre fold One zipped compartment in the back Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Dimensions 11 cm x 22 cm
